item.title: Pepe's Towing Moves a 70,000lb Battery
item.description: A look at the scale, engineering, and purpose behind a massive 70,000-pound battery system and how it is designed for large-scale energy storage.

media:content.media:title: Pepe's Towing Moves a 70,000lb Battery
media:content.media:description: A look at the scale, engineering, and purpose behind a massive 70,000-pound battery system and how it is designed for large-scale energy storage.

item.title: Pepe's Towing: Crushed Truck Recovery
item.description: A towing and recovery crew responds to a heavily damaged truck following a serious roadway accident, highlighting the cleanup and recovery process.

media:content.media:title: Pepe's Towing: Crushed Truck Recovery
media:content.media:description: A towing and recovery crew responds to a heavily damaged truck following a serious roadway accident, highlighting the cleanup and recovery process.
